programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are whale watching when the Flounder hits a rock and starts to sink! This rescue needs all paws on deck. // Stowaway penguins have scattered around Adventure Bay! Time to call the PAW Patrol!

programme.title: The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the "BAM".

programme.title: Astrofools
programme.desc: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop.

programme.title: Mole
programme.desc: Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: Explorer
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: The Crew Fixes The Observatory / The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery! / Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Solar-Powered Bus / The Crew Builds A Lifeguard Tower
programme.desc: When Speed Meister steals Rubble & Crew's bus, the pups have to stop it in time for Sierra Sparkle's big concert! // It's the perfect beach day in Builder Cove! If Rubble & Crew can build a lifeguard tower so the beach can open...

programme.title: Tiny Dancer / The Sleepy Sun
programme.desc: Dora shows the twins a music box with a baila folklorico dancer who comes to life! Bailarina's adelita boots run away, so we need to get them back. // The sun won't set because it can't fall asleep! Dora needs to find Pillow Cloud so Sol can set.

programme.title: The Big Balloon Rescue
programme.desc: All of Axle City is enjoying the Balloon Fair - until Crusher and Pickle get stuck on a runaway hot-air balloon! Now it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue their high-flying friends... before they crash into the Slime Volcano!

programme.title: Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: Roadtrip / Tickets / Talent Show
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: The Pirate Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's Pegwheel the pirate's first race-and who better to join him than Pirate Blaze! Can they beat Crusher to the trophy and prove they're the best racers on the seven seas, or will strong winds and high altitudes get the better of them?

programme.title: The Garbage Truck Challenge
programme.desc: Garbage Truck Blaze is competing in the ultimate trash-themed race: the Garbage Truck Challenge! But Garbage Truck Crusher is also in the race, and he'll do anything to crush the competition. Who will come out on top in this dump truck duel?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds Library Treasure Tunnels / The Crew Builds A Super Snack Dispenser
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew's favorite book series has new additions! But when there's no room for them in the library, the pups have to get creative.// The pups have a surprise just for Rubble... a snack dispenser! But will they finish it before Rubble finds out?

programme.title: Pups Save a T-Rex Tyke / Pups Save a Playful Elephant Calf
programme.desc: When a baby T-Rex gets lost, Ryder and the pups go on a daring mission to the Dino Wilds to help find him. // When Everest joins the Paw Patrol for a visit to the jungle, she makes friends with a clumsy elephant calf and then must help rescue him.

programme.title: Pups Save Katie and Some Kitties / Pups Save Helo Humdinger
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger tricks Katie into watching his kitties, an alarm is set off and the Paw Patrol must rescue them. // Mayor Humdinger swipes one of Ryder's early inventions - an aircraft and must be rescued from an out-of-control flight.

programme.title: Big Big Boots / Backpack's Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: Chompy and the Cloud Flower
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Chompy find another Cloud Flower Seed after he accidentally eats Isa's.

programme.title: Explorer
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: Happy Parky
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Mr Bull the Teacher
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle must go to the dentist so leaves the class with Mr Bull. The children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching, so he decides to show them how to fix a squeaky floorboard.

programme.title: Looking for Things
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is baking an apple pie, so Daddy Pig suggests Peppa and George play a game of looking for things. Peppa and George have fun running around the house solving the clues.

programme.title: Poems
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle introduces the children to poetry, explaining how sounds can be poems too. Together they make a poem about rain and perform it to the parents.

programme.title: Please and Thank You
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa talk to Peppa and George about manners. Madame Gazelle teaches all the children about how wonderful it is to say please and thank you.

programme.title: Detective Potato
programme.desc: Peppa and George are watching Detective Potato on television. When Daddy loses his car in the car park, Detective Potato appears and saves the day!

programme.title: The Electric Car
programme.desc: Daddy Pig arrives in a new electric car. The family all go for a ride and are surprised when the car talks and sings!

programme.title: Stone Age Granny
programme.desc: Granny and her friends' historical re-enactment society are being cave people today. Peppa and George join in helping to catch Grandpa Pig who is dressed as a woolly mammoth.

programme.title: Space Adventure!
programme.desc: Peppa and George are re-enacting the Apollo Moon Landing with the help of Granny Pig's historical re-enactment society. Grampy Rabbit has lent them his rocket, but no one has told him it's just pretend.

programme.title: Fire Station Practice
programme.desc: Today is the fire station practise day. Mummy Pig joins with the other mummies to practise fighting fires. The fire brigade demonstrate their practice using their motto: Ready, Steady, Go!

programme.title: Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: Costume Croc / Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for "later".

programme.title: The Flying Lion
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are excited to play with their new friend Roarian, the Flying Lion! But when Roarian loses his magical sunstone, he turns into a statue! Now it's up to Blaze and AJ to find the sunstone and restore Roarian's powers!

programme.title: Royal Rescue
programme.desc: A visit to the King's castle goes awry when the King accidentally catapults himself far, far away! To bring him home, Blaze, AJ and the King's adorable pet dragon Zeek must transform into knights in shining armor!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: Pups Save a Sleepover / Pups Save the Carnival
programme.desc: Farmer Al's animals go missing during a sleepover. // Cornelius has escaped from the pig ride at the carnival, and the prizes have gone missing too!

programme.title: Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar / Pups Save the Yoga Goats
programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert! // Farmer Yumi's new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! It's up to the Paw Patrol to find the goats and return them to Yumi's farm.

programme.title: Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the "BAM".

programme.title: Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: Super Dad / Time Out / Cookies
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Gaucho Games / Princesa Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help their friend Catalina the Condor become an amazing Gaucha and save the Gaucho Games! // Dora and Boots meet Pilar the Princess Unicorn and help her get back to Unicorn Land!

programme.title: Side-Swiped / Quest for the Blue Bananas
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. // Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.title: Painting
programme.desc: Peppa and George are painting. Daddy shows them how to mix paints and the three of them paint a beautiful picture of a cherry tree. Everything is going very well, until the ducks turn up and decide to run through the paint and all over the painting.

programme.title: Cuckoo Clock
programme.desc: Daddy Pig winds up the old cuckoo clock. When a wooden cuckoo pops out singing "Cuckoo!", Peppa thinks it is very funny, but George has missed the whole thing. George does not want to miss the cuckoo again but the cuckoo only pops out once an hour.

programme.title: The Cycle Ride
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are going for a day's cycle ride. Peppa loves cycling downhill but she's not so keen on peddling uphill. So, when the family meet all of Peppa's friends and decide to have a race, Peppa insists it should be a down hill race.

programme.title: Ice Skating
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going ice-skating for the first time. Mummy Pig teaches Peppa to skate and soon she is having lots of fun. Peppa begins to teach George how to skate but it turns out he is a natural born skater. Peppa and George love ice-skating.

programme.title: Dentist
programme.desc: Peppa and George are at the dentist. Dr Elephant says that Peppa and George's teeth are lovely and clean. But George's plastic toy "Mr Dinosaur" teeth are a bit yellow. Dr Elephant polishes Mr Dinosaurs teeth until they are bright and shiny.s

programme.title: Dens
programme.desc: Peppa is playing in the tree-house with the girls, and George and the boys stay in the castle that Grandpa Pig built for them. But when it starts to rain and the garden is covered in muddy puddles, they rush out to play together!

programme.title: Grandpa's Little Train
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has built a fantastic little train called "Gertrude" and he takes Peppa and George for a ride. Along the way they meet their friends and they all hop aboard. Peppa and George think that "Gertrude" is the very best train in the whole world

programme.title: The Gold Medal Games
programme.desc: It's time for the Gold Medal Games, and Blaze is ready to compete! But when Crusher cheats and sends his rival flying far away, Blaze has to speed back to Axle City to beat the buzzer and win that medal!

programme.title: Pups Save a Stinky Flower / Pups Save a Monkey-Naut
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger drops off a 'gift' to Mayor Goodway, a flower that spreads a horrible stink when it blooms. // Mayor Goodway tries to return it to him, but runs into trouble and has to be rescued by the Paw Patrol.

programme.desc: When a carnival train gets stuck in a tunnel, it results in a mountainside funhouse-style wild ride.

programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.desc: Rubble & Crew use their giant trucks to make awesome stunt ramps when Speed Meister challenges Mayor Greatway to a stunt competition.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United (D6 L24), with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26 (Data Zone)
programme.desc: The 34th season of the Premier League sees Liverpool defend its title against a host of teams keen for glory themselves. 20 teams are in the mix but only 1 champion will emerge ultimately.

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 饥饿游戏
programme.desc: 史上最饿劣的食竞节目! 节目首创以"饥饿"为实境主轴, 想要摆脱'饿'名, 就必须无'饿'不作, 让饥饿指数归零, 成为最后赢家!

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。
